# PublicLiabilityInsurance.co.nz

> New Zealand's dedicated public liability insurance comparison site. We help businesses, tradespeople, schools, and event venues find the right public liability cover from leading NZ insurers — fast, free, and with no broker fees.

## About This Site

PublicLiabilityInsurance.co.nz is operated by Cover4You Ltd, based in Auckland, New Zealand. We are a lead-generation and insurance comparison service that connects New Zealand businesses with local insurance advisors and brokers. We do not sell insurance directly — we provide free, no-obligation quotes by matching businesses with the right insurer for their needs.

## Contact

- Website: https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/contact
- Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
- Phone: 09 885 9549 (quote PLI for best prices)
- Location: Auckland, New Zealand

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/): Compare public liability insurance quotes from NZ's top insurers. Free, no-obligation quotes in minutes.
- [Coverage Guide](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/coverage): Understand what public liability insurance covers, typical policy limits ($1M–$20M), exclusions, and how to choose the right level of cover.
- [Compare Insurers](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/compare): Side-by-side comparison of New Zealand's leading public liability insurers including features, pricing tiers, and customer service ratings.
- [Get a Quote](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/contact): Request a free, personalised public liability insurance quote for your business.

## Sector-Specific Pages

- [Businesses & Retail](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/sectors/businesses): Public liability insurance for retail shops, cafes, restaurants, salons, and customer-facing businesses.
- [Trade Contractors](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/sectors/trade-contractors): Coverage for builders, plumbers, electricians, painters, landscapers, and construction firms.
- [Schools & Education](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/sectors/schools-education): Insurance for ECE centres, primary and secondary schools, tertiary providers, and after-school programs.
- [Public Venues & Events](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/sectors/public-venues): Protection for concert venues, sports grounds, community halls, markets, and adventure recreation.

## Blog & Resources

- [Blog](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/blog): Expert articles on public liability insurance in New Zealand.
- [Understanding Public Liability Insurance in NZ](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/blog/understanding-public-liability-nz): Comprehensive guide to what public liability insurance covers and why it matters.
- [How Much Cover Does Your Business Need?](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/blog/how-much-cover-does-your-business-need): Guide to choosing the right coverage level for your business size and risk profile.
- [Public Liability vs Professional Indemnity](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/blog/public-liability-vs-professional-indemnity): Understanding the difference between these two common business insurance types.
- [Top 5 Claims NZ Businesses Face](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/blog/top-5-claims-nz-businesses-face): Real-world examples of public liability claims in New Zealand.
- [Why $5M Cover is Standard for Trade Contractors](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/blog/trade-contractors-5m-cover-standard): Industry-specific guidance on coverage levels for the trades sector.
- [Schools & Education: Duty of Care](https://publicliabilityinsurance.co.nz/blog/schools-education-duty-of-care): How duty of care obligations affect insurance requirements for education providers.
